market_pulse: Friday lineup shows strong talent bookings across top-tier venues with OMNIA (Zedd/DJ Paul-Y), Hakkasan (Big Sean), and LIV Beach (Tiësto) commanding attention this weekend.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Major headliners (Zedd, Big Sean, Tiësto) confirmed
Strong IG/TT engagement on day club lineups
Competitive pressure from Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesdays
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Accelerate late-night talent announcements by EOD Friday to capture weekend decision-makers; counter Hakkasan's hip-hop momentum with complementary genre positioning.

content_gaps.description: XS/OMNIA/Zouk running heavy TT promoter content with viral guestlist tips and entrance hacks; LIV posts trending toward event recap (post-party) vs. pre-party countdown energy
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 10-second Friday/Saturday nightlife prep series on TT (@livnightclub/@livbeachlasvegas) showing bottle sparkler moments, champagne service detail, DJ booth energy

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan announcing after-parties (Cardi B); OMNIA/Zouk tagging creator names in Stories; LIV's posts lack explicit influencer partnership call-outs
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag micro-influencers (10k-100k followers) in Saturday/Sunday story posts; create 'Creator's Table' highlight on IG

content_gaps.description: TikTok search results show Zouk/XS/OMNIA using current trending Vegas audio (club entrance sounds, night-out transitions); LIV content surfaces older spring/EDC audio
content_gaps.suggested_action: Audit LIV's audio library; sync 3-5 new Friday night TT posts to trending summer club/travel sounds
